productDisplayName: Jack & Jones Men White & Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Style NoteTo all fashion forward guys - your search is over! Jack & Jones is now here on myntra, just waiting to provide you with all the stylish gear you need to create your own JJ look. In all kinds of colours and with cool, quirky prints, grab a tee or two to keep your casual wardrobe fresh and original. If you don't want to have to work hard to look great, then put yourself in Jack and Jones' capable hands... they're there to guarantee you'll turn heads for all the right reasons!Product DetailsWhite and blue striped polo neck T-shirt, made of cotton fabric, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, branding appliqued on the left chest and on the right sleeve, chest buttoned placket and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergentWarm ironSize and FitTight FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
